svg.title: The four ADK state scopes, nested by lifetime
svg.desc: Four concentric boxes showing ADK state scopes nested by how long they live and how widely they are shared. The outermost is app scope, shared across every user and session. Inside it is user scope, bound to one user across their sessions. Inside that is session scope, the default with no prefix, lasting one conversation. Innermost is temp scope, lasting only the current turn and never persisted. A tool selects a scope by prefixing the key, for example tool_context.state of user colon total_offers.
svg.text: app: every user, every session — global
user: one user, across their sessions
temp: this one turn — never persisted
Outer = longer-lived and more widely shared. A tool picks the shelf by prefix: tool_context.state["user:total_offers"]
